title: Specify context.lock
description: Validates the structure of `.specify/context.lock`, the deterministic sidecar written by `specify context generate` and read by `specify context check` to detect renderer-input and fenced-body drift.

version.description: Context lock schema version. Version 1 is the RM-02 lock shape.

fingerprint.description: Aggregate SHA-256 fingerprint for the CLI version and sorted renderer inputs.

cli_version.description: Version of the `specify` CLI that produced the lock.

inputs.description: Files actually consumed by the context renderer, sorted by repo-relative path.

fences.description: Hashes for the generated AGENTS.md fenced region.

body_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the rendered content between the context fences.

path.description: Repo-relative path to a file the renderer read.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the input file bytes.
